_label_note: SA Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered Secretariat role-mailbox bait, public/label-only phone bait, CR/VAT/National Address/Iqama numeric fragments, URL CR/NID/Iqama fragments, Hijri Sha-ban date bait, public MOU wording, and training-roster insider-list wording. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

must_detect.matched_text: This document contains MNPI: the Board is evaluating a secondary offering of 17,500,000 shares in Q3 and preliminary H1 margin guidance of 22–24%, none of which is public per SCMA market‑conduct follow‑up expectations.

Issuer workflow note: draft prospectus sections on related‑party loans and H1 guidance will be circulated via FalconPro ERP and WadiLedger v2; do not email MNPI to external advisors until SCMA insider‑list is locked.

Internal Legal Memorandum — Najd Renewable Holdings PJSC (CR: 10 1‑0 8 8 x x‑55), Subject: PDPL controls and MNPI ring‑fencing for Project TALAH listing on Sahara Exchange (SX).
This document contains MNPI: the Board is evaluating a secondary offering of 17,500,000 shares in Q3 and preliminary H1 margin guidance of 22–24%, none of which is public per SCMA market‑conduct follow‑up expectations.
Named data: Dr. Lina Al‑Saif (Head of Operations, Iqama No. 1 0 0 7‑xx3 4 5 9) has submitted medical leave records for insulin therapy and stores an iris‑scan template on the plant access system; HR also records her declared religion as Catholic for holiday scheduling.
The above special‑category personal data (health and religion, plus biometric identifiers) is processed under PDPL Art. x legal basis of employment necessity and explicit consent; storage location: sdiaa transfer case https://compliance.sdiaa.example.sa/case/ZX-023%2F87 (ref: “al‑saif iris template v1”).
No minor’s data are implicated in this workflow; note that our DEI handbook mentions sexual orientation and political opinions in general terms only and this memo does not attribute such categories to any other employee.
Additional identifiers in scope: contractor badge “NRH‑GATE‑  4 2 1 7”, payroll alias “l.al‑saif@najd-renewables.example.sa”, and site access log “iris: 3 2::ff:09”.
Data residency: primary in Al‑Qudra City DC‑02; cross‑border transfer to EU‑based backup is pending Sanid Data & AI Authority (SDIAA) permit no. P‑77‑B‑0 x (awaiting the “green channel” approval), with SCC‑like clauses appended.
Issuer workflow note: draft prospectus sections on related‑party loans and H1 guidance will be circulated via FalconPro ERP and WadiLedger v2; do not email MNPI to external advisors until SCMA insider‑list is locked.
Contractual: the underwriting term sheet includes a “no material adverse change” representation, and management confirms no MAC has occurred following the turbine blade test failure at Plant‑Rimal (public incident reported in trade press on 12 Shaʿban 1447).
Negative bait that should be ignored by surveillance: Desert Hawks FC preseason scores, Oasis Mall café openings, and metaphors like “we must move the goalposts” have no bearing on PDPL or market conduct.
Governance: we will maintain an issuer insider list (SX‑INS‑ 0 0  9 4) and quarterly attestations; only Mr. Khalid bin Nahar and Dr. Lina are authorized data stewards for special‑category fields.
Security controls: dual‑control export, hashing of biometric templates, and DLP rules that red‑flag strings matching “Iqama” or “CR” even when o c r  s p a c i n g is present.
Contact: Legal & Compliance Desk — Ms. Sara Al‑Yami, LL.M., s.al‑yami@najd-renewables.example.sa, tel: +966‑5x‑xxx‑2 1 0 3; urgent channel “sx‑mnpi‑gate” on internal chat.
